name: Sahel
description: Conflict, food insecurity, weak governance and climate pressure create long-term displacement risk.

name: North Africa
description: North Africa acts as both a transit space and a maritime departure zone toward Europe.

name: Türkiye and Eastern Mediterranean
description: This region connects Middle Eastern displacement pressure with EU border systems.

name: Western Balkans
description: The Western Balkans remain a key overland corridor toward Hungary, Croatia, Austria and Germany.

name: Hungary and Central Europe
description: Hungary and Central Europe are important for border pressure, transit monitoring and political impact assessment.
